zh.of, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Deincourt II於大約1327年出生在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼時，他的父親William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt28歲，母親Millicent la Zouche33歲。他於大約1341年與Margaret de Welles在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1364年6月2日之前在英國巴金哈姆爾武本。

zh-hans.of, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Deincourt II于大约1327年出生在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼时，他的父亲William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt28岁，母亲Millicent la Zouche33岁。他于大约1341年与Margaret de Welles在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1364年6月2日之前在英国巴金哈姆爾武本。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Deincourt II was born about 1327, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, his father, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, was 28 and his mother, Millicent la Zouche, was 33. He married Margaret de Welles about 1341, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died before 2 June 1364, in Wooburn, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Deincourt II est né environ 1327, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Millicent la Zouche, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Welles environ 1341, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 2 juin 1364, à Wooburn, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Deincourt II um 1327 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt 28 und seine Mutter Millicent la Zouche 33. Er hat um 1341 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 2. Juni 1364 in Wooburn, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Deincourt II è nato il circa 1327 nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Millicent la Zouche, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Welles circa 1341, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 2 giugno 1364, nel Wooburn, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Deincourt IIが約1327年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで生まれた時，父William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourtは28歳，母Millicent la Zoucheは33歳であった。約1341年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでMargaret de Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1364年6月2日以前にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウブルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Deincourt II(이)가 대략 1327년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Millicent la Zouche(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1341년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Margaret de Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 6월 2일 이전 영국 벅잉함실르 보콥른에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1327–before 2 June 1364: ойролцоогоор 1327 он–1364 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 2–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Deincourt II nasceu aproximadamente 1327, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Millicent la Zouche, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Welles aproximadamente 1341, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 2 de junho de 1364, em Wooburn, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Deincourt II родился около 1327 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent la Zouche, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Welles около 1341 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 2 июнь 1364 г. в местности вубурн, буккингхамшир, Англия.

sm.about 1327–before 2 June 1364: e tusa o le 1327–a'e le'I oo le 2 Iuni 1364

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Deincourt II nació aproximadamente 1327, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Millicent la Zouche, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Margaret de Welles aproximadamente 1341, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 2 de junio de 1364, en Wooburn, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
